title: What's new with data agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech presented updates to data analytics agents with new capabilities for data engineering, science, and conversational analytics. The session covered the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations, accessible through Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, and IDEs like VSCode.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through updates to its data analytics agents, spanning data engineering, data science, and conversational analytics. The session details Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations, with access through Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, and IDEs including VSCode. The practical takeaway is that these agent capabilities reach across multiple tools rather than a single proprietary interface, via ADK and MCP.
